authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.40(b)(27) — Chorro Creek (San Luis Obispo Co.)
sources.quotedText: (27) Chorro Creek (San Luis Obispo Co.) from the mean high tide line upstream to the South Bay Boulevard Bridge. Dec. 1 through Mar. 7, but only on Sat., Sun., Wed., legal holidays and opening and closing days. Only barbless hooks may be used.

sources.title: 2026 California Freshwater Sport Fishing Regulations (CDFW booklet)
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

parameters.note: Open only on Saturdays, Sundays, Wednesdays, legal holidays, and opening/closing days within the Dec. 1–Mar. 7 season. Applies from the mean high tide line upstream to the South Bay Boulevard Bridge.

regulations.humanSummary: Open Dec. 1 through Mar. 7, but only Saturdays, Sundays, Wednesdays, legal holidays, and opening/closing days, from the mean high tide line upstream to the South Bay Boulevard Bridge
regulations.verbatimText: Dec. 1 through Mar. 7, but only on Sat., Sun., Wed., legal holidays and opening and closing days.

parameters.note: Only barbless hooks may be used.

regulations.humanSummary: Only barbless hooks may be used (bait permitted, unlike some other hatchery-trout streams)
regulations.verbatimText: Only barbless hooks may be used.

parameters.counting_rule: 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead (adipose-fin-clipped, denoted ** in the regulations) daily bag limit; 4 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead in possession.

regulations.humanSummary: 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead daily; 4 in possession
regulations.verbatimText: 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead **. 4 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead ** in possession.

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
